title: D&D 5e 2024 Adventuring Gear
description: Complete list of adventuring gear with descriptions, costs, and special properties

gear.name: Acid
gear.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

gear.name: Alchemist's Fire
gear.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.

gear.name: Ammunition
gear.description: Ammunition is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property.

gear.name: Antitoxin
gear.description: As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

gear.name: Arcane Focus
gear.description: An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.

gear.name: Backpack
gear.description: A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

gear.name: Ball Bearings
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings from their pouch. They spread to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition.

gear.name: Barrel
gear.capacity: 40 gallons of liquid or 4 cubic feet of dry goods
gear.description: A Barrel holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

gear.name: Basket
gear.description: A Basket holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

gear.name: Bedroll
gear.description: A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold.

gear.name: Bell
gear.description: When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

gear.name: Blanket
gear.description: While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold.

gear.name: Block and Tackle
gear.description: A Block and Tackle allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

gear.name: Book
gear.description: A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks you make about that topic.

gear.name: Bottle, Glass
gear.description: A Glass Bottle holds up to 1½ pints.

gear.name: Bucket
gear.description: A Bucket holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

gear.name: Burglar's Pack
gear.description: A Burglar's Pack contains essential tools for stealth and infiltration.

gear.name: Caltrops
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops from their bag to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

gear.name: Candle
gear.description: For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

gear.name: Case, Crossbow Bolt
gear.description: A Crossbow Bolt Case holds up to 20 Bolts.

gear.name: Case, Map or Scroll
gear.capacity: 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment
gear.description: A Map or Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

gear.name: Chain
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. Escaping requires DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics) or DC 20 Strength (Athletics).

gear.name: Chest
gear.description: A Chest holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

gear.name: Climber's Kit
gear.description: A Climber's Kit includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can use it to anchor yourself; when you do, you can't fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point.

gear.name: Clothes, Fine
gear.description: Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

gear.name: Clothes, Traveler's
gear.description: Traveler's Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

gear.name: Component Pouch
gear.description: A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

gear.name: Costume
gear.description: While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

gear.name: Crowbar
gear.description: Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.

gear.name: Diplomat's Pack
gear.description: A Diplomat's Pack contains items for social encounters and negotiations.

gear.name: Druidic Focus
gear.description: A Druidic Focus is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.

gear.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
gear.description: A Dungeoneer's Pack contains essential gear for underground exploration.

gear.name: Entertainer's Pack
gear.description: An Entertainer's Pack contains items for performance and travel.

gear.name: Explorer's Pack
gear.description: An Explorer's Pack contains basic adventuring necessities.

gear.name: Flask
gear.description: A Flask holds up to 1 pint.

gear.name: Grappling Hook
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, a ledge, or another catch within 50 feet of yourself, and the hook catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check.

gear.name: Healer's Kit
gear.description: A Healer's Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

gear.name: Holy Symbol

variants.name: Emblem (borne on fabric or a Shield)

gear.description: A Holy Symbol is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus.

gear.name: Holy Water
gear.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

gear.name: Hunting Trap
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can set a Hunting Trap. A creature that steps on the plate must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

gear.name: Ink
gear.description: Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

gear.name: Ink Pen
gear.description: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

gear.name: Jug
gear.description: A Jug holds up to 1 gallon.

gear.name: Ladder
gear.description: A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

gear.name: Lamp
gear.description: A Lamp burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

gear.name: Lantern, Bullseye
gear.description: A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

gear.name: Lantern, Hooded
gear.description: A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius.

gear.name: Lock
gear.description: A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick this Lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

gear.name: Magnifying Glass
gear.description: A Magnifying Glass grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Lighting a fire with a Magnifying Glass requires light as bright as sunlight to focus, tinder to ignite, and about 5 minutes.

gear.name: Manacles
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can use Manacles to bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

gear.name: Map
gear.description: If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find your way in the place represented on it.

gear.name: Mirror
gear.description: A handheld steel Mirror is useful for personal cosmetics but also for peeking around corners and reflecting light as a signal.

gear.name: Net
gear.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a Net. Target a creature you can see within 15 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or have the Restrained condition until it escapes.

gear.name: Oil
gear.description: You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel. Once lit, a flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern.

gear.name: Paper
gear.description: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

gear.name: Parchment
gear.description: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

gear.name: Perfume
gear.description: Perfume comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying Perfume to yourself, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet of yourself.

gear.name: Poison, Basic
gear.description: As a Bonus Action, you can use a vial of Basic Poison to coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon or ammunition takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage.

gear.name: Pole
gear.description: A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. If you must make a Strength (Athletics) check as part of a High or Long Jump, you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself Advantage on the check.

gear.name: Pot, Iron
gear.description: An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.

gear.name: Potion of Healing
gear.description: This potion is a magic item. As a Bonus Action, you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet of yourself. The creature that drinks the magical red fluid in this vial regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

gear.name: Pouch
gear.capacity: 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot
gear.description: A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

gear.name: Priest's Pack
gear.description: A Priest's Pack contains items for religious ceremonies and travel.

gear.name: Quiver
gear.description: A Quiver holds up to 20 Arrows.

gear.name: Ram, Portable
gear.description: You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help you use the ram, giving you Advantage on this check.

gear.name: Rations
gear.description: Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.

gear.name: Robe
gear.description: A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

gear.name: Rope
gear.description: As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

gear.name: Sack
gear.description: A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

gear.name: Scholar's Pack
gear.description: A Scholar's Pack contains items for research and study.

gear.name: Shovel
gear.description: Working for 1 hour, you can use a Shovel to dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

gear.name: Signal Whistle
gear.description: When blown as a Utilize action, a Signal Whistle produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

gear.name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
gear.description: A Spell Scroll (Cantrip) is a magic item that bears the words of a cantrip. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time. The spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5.

gear.name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
gear.description: A Spell Scroll (Level 1) is a magic item that bears the words of a level 1 spell. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time. The spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5.

gear.name: Spikes, Iron
gear.description: Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can use a blunt object, such as a Light Hammer, to hammer a spike into wood, earth, or a similar material.

gear.name: Spyglass
gear.description: Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

gear.name: String
gear.description: String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

gear.name: Tent
gear.description: A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

gear.name: Tinderbox
gear.description: A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

gear.name: Torch
gear.description: A Torch burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. When you take the Attack action, you can attack with the Torch as a Simple Melee weapon dealing 1 Fire damage on hit.

gear.name: Vial
gear.description: A Vial holds up to 4 ounces.

gear.name: Waterskin
gear.description: A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints. If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration.
